channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in JavaScript (All-time)

item.title: 📜 webpack/webpack (65843 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: webpack

📝 Repository: webpack/webpack

📄 Descrizione: A bundler for javascript and friends. Packs many modules into a few bundled assets. Code Splitting allows for loading parts of the application on demand. Through "loaders", modules can be CommonJs, AMD, ES6 modules, CSS, Images, JSON, Coffeescript, LESS, ... and your custom stuff.

⭐ Stelle: 65843

🍴 Forks: 9411

💻 Linguaggio: JavaScript

🏷️ Topics: amd build-tool commonjs compiler es2015 es6 esm javascript javascript-compiler javascript-modules loaders module-bundler plugins web web-performance webpack

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2012-03-10T10:08:14Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-07-20T05:26:58Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>
